package rulecoverage

func PositivePassthroughWrapperInterface() string {
    ruleID := "passthrough_wrapper_interface"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Wrapper structs that mostly forward one-to-one through an interface field with little added policy."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
